testcase.name: test_check_existing_rejected_have_proper_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Rejected request 7a9f69b0 missing reject_reason assert (None or '') + where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfea3c9bfb780>('admin_notes') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfea3c9bfb780> = {'account_number': None, 'admin_notes': '', 'amount_inr': 100.0, 'bank_name': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_bill_payment_rejection.py:410: in test_check_existing_rejected_have_proper_fields assert reject_reason or req.get("admin_notes"), \ E AssertionError: Rejected request 7a9f69b0 missing reject_reason E assert (None or '') E + where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfea3c9bfb780>('admin_notes') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfea3c9bfb780> = {'account_number': None, 'admin_notes': '', 'amount_inr': 100.0, 'bank_name': None, ...}.get
